hypothesis: Same-script gzip-NCD discovers thematic Quran <-> Arabic-Bible pairings (e.g., Yusuf <-> Joseph (Genesis), Musa <-> Exodus, Maryam <-> Luke) at top-3 nearest-neighbour rank, while Quran <-> Iliad cross-script NCD is uniformly degenerate (mean >= 0.95).

thematic_pairings.description: Qasas <-> Moses' birth and calling / Exodus
Baqara <-> creation + Decalogue (long surah; Genesis or Exodus)
Maryam <-> Mary / Annunciation (Luke / لوقا or Matthew / متى)
Aal-Imran <-> family of Imran / Mary / Jesus narrative
Anbiya <-> Prophets (Daniel / دانيال or Kings / ملوك)
